title: Hungry for Bananas
description: Makes your hunger bar into bananas!
body:
**Your hunger is now converted to BANANAS! EVERYTHING you eat is converted into bananas right at your fingertips on your hotbar!**

**Now wouldn't you say that that's amazing?**

_This is an overlay and should be placed over any resource pack that you are using with it. This also makes it very light and it should not affect your ingame performance._
